gui.text_chat.setup.title: Setup Simple Text Chat
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_1: Welcome to Simple Text Chat, a simple mod that bring you talking-chatting experience!
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_2: Here are some config to do now.
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_3: First, download a Vosk model for voice recognization.
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_4: Second, select a working mode you prefer!
gui.text_chat.setup.description.line_5: Finally, after setup, you can enjoy unique talking-chatting experience!
